testcase.name: test_mudras_endpoint

failure.message: assert 'mudras' in [{'benefits': ['Enhances concentration and memory', 'Sharpens mental clarity', 'Calms the mind and reduces anxiety', 'Relieves insomnia and headaches', 'Stimulates the pituitary gland'], 'category': 'meditation', 'chakra': 'Crown', 'color': '#D8B4FE', ...}, {'benefits': ['Centers and calms the mind', 'Reduces stress and anxiety', 'Promotes humility and gratitude', 'Balances left and right brain hemispheres', 'Opens the heart chakra'], 'category': 'devotional', 'chakra': 'Heart', 'color': '#FDA4AF', ...}, {'benefits': ['Deepens meditation practice', 'Tranquilizes the mind completely', 'Promotes inner peace and equanimity', 'Enhances spiritual connection', 'Activates the energy of concentration'], 'category': 'meditation', 'chakra': 'Sacral', 'color': '#FCD34D', ...}, {'benefits': ['Activates dormant prana (life force)', 'Boosts immune system function', 'Improves eyesight and eye health', 'Reduces chronic fatigue', 'Energizes the entire body', 'Helps overcome vitamin deficiency'], 'category': 'healing', 'chakra': 'Root', 'color': '#22C55E', ...}, {'benefits': ['Detoxifies and purifies the body', 'Regulates digestive system', 'Promotes patience and inner stability', 'Balances the earth element', 'Relieves constipation', 'Helps regulate menstrual cycles'], 'category': 'healing', 'chakra': 'Solar Plexus', 'color': '#FB923C', ...}, {'benefits': ['Reduces gas, bloating, and flatulence', 'Calms an overactive nervous system', 'Relieves joint pain and arthritis', "Reduces trembling and Parkinson's symptoms", 'Balances vata dosha', 'Alleviates neck and back pain'], 'category': 'healing', 'chakra': 'Heart', 'color': '#3B82F6', ...}, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_v56_2_immersive_sage.py:158: in test_mudras_endpoint assert "mudras" in data E assert 'mudras' in [{'benefits': ['Enhances concentration and memory', 'Sharpens mental clarity', 'Calms the mind and reduces anxiety', 'Relieves insomnia and headaches', 'Stimulates the pituitary gland'], 'category': 'meditation', 'chakra': 'Crown', 'color': '#D8B4FE', ...}, {'benefits': ['Centers and calms the mind', 'Reduces stress and anxiety', 'Promotes humility and gratitude', 'Balances left and right brain hemispheres', 'Opens the heart chakra'], 'category': 'devotional', 'chakra': 'Heart', 'color': '#FDA4AF', ...}, {'benefits': ['Deepens meditation practice', 'Tranquilizes the mind completely', 'Promotes inner peace and equanimity', 'Enhances spiritual connection', 'Activates the energy of concentration'], 'category': 'meditation', 'chakra': 'Sacral', 'color': '#FCD34D', ...}, {'benefits': ['Activates dormant prana (life force)', 'Boosts immune system function', 'Improves eyesight and eye health', 'Reduces chronic fatigue', 'Energizes the entire body', 'Helps overcome vitamin deficiency'], 'category': 'healing', 'chakra': 'Root', 'color': '#22C55E', ...}, {'benefits': ['Detoxifies and purifies the body', 'Regulates digestive system', 'Promotes patience and inner stability', 'Balances the earth element', 'Relieves constipation', 'Helps regulate menstrual cycles'], 'category': 'healing', 'chakra': 'Solar Plexus', 'color': '#FB923C', ...}, {'benefits': ['Reduces gas, bloating, and flatulence', 'Calms an overactive nervous system', 'Relieves joint pain and arthritis', "Reduces trembling and Parkinson's symptoms", 'Balances vata dosha', 'Alleviates neck and back pain'], 'category': 'healing', 'chakra': 'Heart', 'color': '#3B82F6', ...}, ...]
